message:
🐛 Fix GA4 transport_url to use absolute origin (#1265)

GA4 treats transport_url as an origin (not a path), so '/t/g' was
resolving to host 't' instead of the current domain. Use
window.location.origin + '/t' so GA4 correctly appends '/g/collect'.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
